top.subtitle: Your personalized path through Gatame Kosen Online
top.returningUserHint: Already saved your progress? Sign in with the same email — even after clearing browser data or on another device.
top.crossDeviceBody: Sign in with the email you used when you saved progress. Your path restores from the cloud.
top.signedInHint: You are signed in. Cloud sync is active on this device.
top.syncBannerBody: Sign in to save your path and progress to the cloud — continue on any device after email verification.
top.saveProgressPromptDrawer: Your path and progress are only on this device until you sign in. Save to the cloud to continue on any device.
top.saveProgressPromptTodo: Great start on your checklist. Sign in to save your progress so you will not lose it.

app.title: Learning Path Navigator
app.subtitle: Gatame Kosen Online — Personalized learning system

retakeAssessment.title: Retake the assessment?
retakeAssessment.description: Your current learning path will be cleared. Your module progress (completed steps and notes) will stay saved.

bbsMastered.title: Mark this rank as mastered?
bbsMastered.description: Your declaration is recorded permanently for this assessment and cannot be undone from the app.

annualMembership.title: Confirm your Annual Membership
annualMembership.description: We will stop showing the upgrade prompt going forward. You can re-trigger it later via Profile if needed.

bbsReminderText: No additional one-time purchase is needed. You already have access to this curriculum!

errors.learningPathFailed: Could not load your learning path.
errors.imageExportFailed: Could not export the image. Try taking a screenshot instead.
errors.pathGenerationCanceled: Path generation canceled. You can try again anytime.
errors.noModulesRemaining: You have completed every module available for this assessment. Retake the assessment if your goals have changed.

toast.feedbackSaveFailed: Could not save your feedback. Completion is recorded locally.

toast.memoSaveFailed: Could not save your notes. Check your connection.

syncSave.title: Save your progress
syncSave.description: Sign in to save your path and progress to the cloud — continue on any device after verification.
syncSave.successMessage: We sent a sign-in link to your email. Open it to continue.

access.title: Restore on this device
access.subtitle: Sign in with the email you used when you saved progress. Your path and progress will load from the cloud.
access.sendFailed: Could not send. Please try again.
access.successMessage: We sent a sign-in link to your email. Please check your inbox.
access.prefilledHint: We filled in your member email. Request a sign-in link and open it in your email.
access.defaultHint: Enter the email you used to save progress. Your path appears after you open the link in your email.
access.kajabiWarning: The email from your Kajabi link was not expanded (URL still shows {token}). Type your email manually or fix the Kajabi link to use a personalized Email field.

signUpEmailSent.title: Confirmation email sent
signUpEmailSent.instruction: Open that email, tap Confirm, then sign in here.
signUpEmailSent.spamHint: Not in inbox? Check spam — sender is Supabase Auth.

sync.authStale: Your sign-in session is no longer valid. Please open the access link from your email again.

banner.syncing: Saving your progress to the cloud…
banner.pending: Some changes are not saved to the cloud yet
banner.error: Could not save progress to the cloud
banner.offline: You are offline — progress will sync when you are back online

profile.heading: Cloud sync
profile.synced: All changes saved to the cloud
profile.error: Could not save to the cloud
profile.offline: Offline — progress is stored on this device

api.backendUnreachable: Could not reach the backend. Start Spring Boot in `backend` (default port 8080), keep the frontend on `npm run dev`, and try again.
api.proxyFailed: The request did not reach the backend via the proxy. Check that Spring Boot is listening on localhost:8080.
api.badRequest: The server could not accept the request (400).
api.requestRejected: The server rejected the request payload (400).
api.requestTimedOut: Generating your path is taking longer than expected. Please try again.
api.corsForbidden: API access was blocked (403). For local dev: run `npm run dev:api` in one terminal and `npm run dev` in another, then open http://localhost:5173. See LOCAL_DEVELOPMENT.md.

verticalPath.noPath: No personalized path can be displayed.

pathStageComplete.title: Ready for your next challenge?
pathStageComplete.description: You finished all 4 modules on this path. Generate your next set of modules from what is still left in your curriculum.
pathStageComplete.descriptionExhausted: You have completed every module matched to this assessment. Retake the assessment if your goals or focus areas have changed.
pathStageComplete.bannerHint: Stage complete — keep going with your next 4 modules.

bbsGate.unlockedBanner: Black Belt System is available anytime on your path.
bbsGate.offerIntro: Expert feedback and formal rank certification.
bbsGate.checkoutUnavailable: Checkout is not available for this level yet.

moduleHints.problemMatch: This module aligns strongly with the challenges you picked. Picture real match moments and drill with intent.
moduleHints.default: Watch the overview video, then build clean reps solo or in a small group.

todaysFocus.label: Today's focus
todaysFocus.subcopy: Focus on this technique when you practice next.
notWorkingEduMessages: The form can look right on video, but in randori it often breaks at distance, kuzushi, and head position.
When the same technique keeps failing, fix force direction and timing before speed — in Kosen Judo and BJJ alike.
That "not working" feeling is useful data. Slow down and check whether kuzushi, timing, or the finish broke first.

pathDrawer.memoPlaceholder: Note down the points you noticed or tips from your sensei.
pathDrawer.prereqForComplete: Complete prerequisite modules to enable the completion button.
pathDrawer.lockedByAssessment: This step is locked based on your assessment results.
pathDrawer.allTodosForComplete: Check every item in the checklist to enable "Mark as Completed".

offer.title: Unlock the full technique video library
offer.subcopy: Start with a 14-day free trial on Gatame Kosen Online.

benefits.title: 150+ technique videos
benefits.body: One-minute lessons focused on Kosen Judo groundwork.

benefits.title: Black Belt System savings
benefits.body: Member promo codes for Kyukyu and Sankyu certification.

benefits.title: Train anywhere
benefits.body: Unlimited streaming for one year on any device.

assessment.q2PainsTitle: Q2. What technical challenges do you want to solve?
assessment.q2PainsHint: Select any that apply—or skip this step if you prefer a broad path.

assessment.q2AltHint: Select all styles that resonate with you.

annualMembershipChoices.title: Yes, I have Annual Membership
annualMembershipChoices.description: I can access the video library on Gatame Kosen Online.

annualMembershipChoices.title: Not yet
annualMembershipChoices.description: Show me membership options when I want to watch videos.

interests.title: Tachi-waza to Osaekomi
interests.body: Focus on throwing techniques and securing the pin.

interests.title: Guard & Submission
interests.body: Focus on guard work, back takes, and finishing with joint locks or chokes.

interests.title: Full Transition
interests.body: Focus on the seamless flow from standing positions to ground fighting.

noviceVibes.label: 投げたい
noviceVibes.title: Dynamic Throws
noviceVibes.vibe: Master the iconic Judo throws to achieve a clean Ippon.

noviceVibes.label: 抑え込み（Judo）
noviceVibes.title: Ground Control
noviceVibes.vibe: Learn to hold down an opponent so they cannot escape or attack.

noviceVibes.label: 極めたい
noviceVibes.title: Submission Arts
noviceVibes.vibe: Learn to finish the fight using joint locks and chokes.

noviceVibes.label: 連動性（Mix）
noviceVibes.title: Standing to Ground
noviceVibes.vibe: Learn the flow of taking an opponent down and finishing immediately.

goals.title: Fix Your Weakness
goals.body: Solve specific technical bottlenecks in your daily training.

goals.title: Gatame Kosen Mastery
goals.body: Master the full technical curriculum and earn your Black Belt.

goals.title: Fill the Gaps
goals.body: Complete your skill tree by adding missing techniques to your game.

goals.title: Curriculum for Coaches
goals.body: Learn how to structure and explain techniques to your students.

standing-flow-to-submission.headline: Throw to Submission
standing-flow-to-submission.scenario: I can't finish on the ground immediately after a throw.

pin-after-throw.headline: Pin Escapes
pin-after-throw.scenario: Opponents escape before I can establish a solid pin.

turtle-breakdown.headline: Flipping the Turtle
turtle-breakdown.scenario: I can't break down or flip a turtle opponent.

submission-arts-mastery.headline: Submission Arts Mastery
submission-arts-mastery.scenario: I want to develop my submission techniques.

guard-pass-defense.headline: Guard Pass & Defense
guard-pass-defense.scenario: I want to retain my guard and hit sweeps.

grip-fight.headline: Gripping Battles
grip-fight.scenario: I lose the gripping exchange and can't start my attacks.
